# Hibana v0.1.0 - Table of Contents

A lightweight Elixir web framework built on Plug and Cowboy. Direct routing like Sinatra, powerful plugins like Phoenix, full OTP power.

## Pages

- [Overview](readme.md)
- [Changelog](changelog.md)

## Modules

- [Hibana](Hibana.md): Hibana - A lightweight web framework for Elixir.
- [Hibana.Application](Hibana.Application.md): Hibana application supervision tree.
- [Hibana.LiveView.Socket](Hibana.LiveView.Socket.md): The LiveView socket that holds the state.

- [Hibana.Plug.Defaults](Hibana.Plug.Defaults.md): Default plug for request processing.

- Core
  - [Hibana.CompiledRouter](Hibana.CompiledRouter.md): High-performance compiled router that generates pattern-match function clauses at compile time.
  - [Hibana.Controller](Hibana.Controller.md): Base controller module for handling HTTP responses.
  - [Hibana.Endpoint](Hibana.Endpoint.md): HTTP endpoint module that starts the Cowboy HTTP server.
  - [Hibana.Pipeline](Hibana.Pipeline.md): Middleware pipeline DSL with route groups and per-group plugs.
  - [Hibana.Router](Hibana.Router.md): Router module for handling HTTP requests with pattern matching.
  - [Hibana.Router.DSL](Hibana.Router.DSL.md): DSL macros for defining routes in a router.
  - [Hibana.TestHelpers](Hibana.TestHelpers.md): Test helpers for Hibana applications. Provides convenient functions
for testing controllers, routes, and plugs.
  - [Hibana.Validator](Hibana.Validator.md): Schema-based request parameter validation.

- Real-time
  - [Hibana.Cluster](Hibana.Cluster.md): Built-in cluster support with node discovery, distributed PubSub, and process distribution.
  - [Hibana.LiveView](Hibana.LiveView.md): LiveView behavior for real-time server-rendered HTML.
  - [Hibana.SSE](Hibana.SSE.md): Server-Sent Events (SSE) support for real-time streaming.
  - [Hibana.WebSocket](Hibana.WebSocket.md): WebSocket handler behavior for Hibana.
  - [Hibana.WebSocket.CowboyAdapter](Hibana.WebSocket.CowboyAdapter.md): Bridges Hibana.WebSocket callbacks to Cowboy's cowboy_websocket behavior.

- Background Processing
  - [Hibana.CircuitBreaker](Hibana.CircuitBreaker.md): Circuit breaker for external service calls. Prevents cascading failures
by stopping calls to failing services.
  - [Hibana.Cron](Hibana.Cron.md): Built-in cron scheduler. Schedule recurring jobs with cron expressions.
  - [Hibana.Job](Hibana.Job.md): Background job queue module using OTP.
  - [Hibana.PersistentQueue](Hibana.PersistentQueue.md): High-performance persistent job queue with disk spillover and backpressure.
  - [Hibana.Queue](Hibana.Queue.md): Persistent background job queue with GenServer and Erlang processes.

- Infrastructure
  - [Hibana.ChunkedUpload](Hibana.ChunkedUpload.md): Large file upload support with chunked/resumable uploads (100GB+).
  - [Hibana.CodeReloader](Hibana.CodeReloader.md): Hot code reloading for development. Watches source files and automatically
recompiles when changes are detected.
  - [Hibana.EventStore](Hibana.EventStore.md): Event sourcing with GenServer, ETS storage, projections, and subscriptions.
  - [Hibana.Features](Hibana.Features.md): Feature toggle system for enabling/disabling plugins and modules via config.
  - [Hibana.FileStreamer](Hibana.FileStreamer.md): Zero-copy file streaming using sendfile(2) syscall for maximum performance.
  - [Hibana.GenServer](Hibana.GenServer.md): Base GenServer module for Hibana applications.
  - [Hibana.OTPCache](Hibana.OTPCache.md): OTP-based in-memory cache using GenServer with TTL support.
  - [Hibana.Plugin](Hibana.Plugin.md): Behaviour for Hibana plugins.
  - [Hibana.Plugin.Registry](Hibana.Plugin.Registry.md): Registry for managing plugins at runtime.
  - [Hibana.Warmup](Hibana.Warmup.md): Pre-load data on startup with a macro DSL.
